rules.corporate_shadows_style: Omni Flash format: dark cinematic documentary, image-rich, short generated clips under 8-10s, real images only when high-quality and licensed.
rules.saints_style: Respectful documentary: icon imagery, monastery photography, manuscript visuals, calm narration. No generated cinematic clips.
rules.SAAS_AUTOPILOT_style: TBD — define during setup phase. Likely screen-capture + talking-head style or animated explainer.
rules.canonical_rule: Before any upload, check metadata/canonical_slate.json. Do not schedule a video for a slot that already has canonical: true without first superseding the existing entry.
rules.corporate_shadows_new_production: paused by user 2026-05-31 — maintenance and Shorts only unless explicitly resumed
rules.saints_production: active — full production permitted on Saints channel (separate OAuth required)
rules.SAAS_AUTOPILOT_production: setup phase — strategy and templates only, no uploads until pilot review
